title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero from Cursor discusses how the company builds agentic workflows across the entire SDLC, moving beyond the 40% productivity plateau with AI coding assistants. The team has deployed specialized agents for bug triage, security review, risk detection, growth experimentation, and project management functions, requiring organizational shifts to succeed at scale.
